title: rubus × vulnericiformis
intro: Rubus × vulnericiformis, also known as the Blackberry Bramble, is a hybrid plant species belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus × vulnericiformis include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and providing relief from pain and fever, making it a popular remedy in herbal medicine. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves, stems, and roots can also be used in herbal preparations such as salves and ointments.
